Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) entries = data.get\('feed', {}\).get\('entry', []\) for entry in entries[:10]: if 'author' in entry: title = entry.get\('title', {}\).get\('label', ''\) content = entry.get\('content', {}\).get\('label', ''\) rating = entry.get\('im:rating', {}\).get\('label', ''\) print\(f'Rating: {rating}/5 - {title}'\) print\(f' {content[:300]}'\) print\(\) except Exception as e: print\(f'Error: {e}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) entries = data.get\('feed', {}\).get\('entry', []\) for entry in entries: if 'author' in entry: title = entry.get\('title', {}\).get\('label', ''\) content = entry.get\('content', {}\).get\('label', ''\) rating = entry.get\('im:rating', {}\).get\('label', ''\) version = entry.get\('im:version', {}\).get\('label', ''\) print\(f'Rating: {rating}/5 \(v{version}\) - {title}'\) print\(f' {content[:500]}'\) print\(\) except Exception as e: print\(f'Error: {e}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re content = sys.stdin.read\(\) text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', content\) text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\) for match in re.finditer\(r'.{0,150}Pocketify.{0,150}', text, re.IGNORECASE\): print\(match.group\(\).strip\(\)\) print\('---'\) ")
